title: PMS Nutcracker DIY - Christmas Soldier Various Subjects
features: Paint your own wooden Nutcracker soldier. One supplied at random.

GET CREATIVE - Unleash your creativity this holiday season with the Paint Your Own Wooden Christmas Nutcracker Soldier. Standing at 6 inches tall, this classic wooden nutcracker is the perfect festive craft activity for both kids and adults.

6 INCH NUTCRACKER - This traditional 6 inch 15.2cm wooden nutcracker soldier is finely crafted, offering a smooth surface that's ready for painting. The detailed design serves as the perfect canvas for creating a personalized holiday decoration. One design will be supplied at random.

PAINTS INCLUDED - The kit comes with 6 mini tempera paint pots in festive colours, allowing you to design your nutcracker soldier in any style you like. The paints are vibrant, easy to apply, and dry quickly, perfect for kids and adults alike. A paintbrush is included, so you have everything you need to get started right away.

REALISTIC BEARD - The nutcracker soldier features a fluffy white beard, adding a touch of authenticity to your creation. This textured addition helps bring the soldier to life and enhances its traditional charm.

CUSTOMIZABLE DESIGN - The plain wooden finish allows you to paint and decorate the nutcracker however you like. Whether you follow classic Christmas colours or create something completely unique, this craft is ideal for showcasing your creativity.
